channel.title: morningNewsPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: More Than a Dozen Democrats Call on Trump Administration to Protect Iranians in U.S.
item.description: Democratic lawmakers signed a letter urging the Trump administration to provide protection for Iranian nationals residing in the U.S. who face safety risks if returned to Iran.

item.title: Watchdog Files Updated IRS Complaint Challenging SPLC's Tax-Exempt Status
item.description: Following a federal indictment, a government watchdog organization submitted a revised complaint to the IRS questioning the tax-exempt classification of the Southern Poverty Law Center.

item.title: Judge Rules Virginia Ballot Language Misleading in Democratic Amendment Proposal
item.description: A judge found that the wording used by Democrats on a Virginia ballot measure was inaccurate and failed to adequately describe the proposed constitutional amendment.

item.title: Trump Administration Expands Efforts to Address Childhood Lead Poisoning Risks
item.description: The EPA is redirecting unused state funds and launching new public awareness tools as part of the administration's next phase of efforts to reduce lead exposure in children.

item.title: Unauthorized Access to Anthropic's Mythos AI Model Highlights Cybersecurity Risks
item.description: A Discord group's unauthorized access to Anthropic's Mythos cybersecurity model is being described as more than a standard breach, raising broader concerns about AI-assisted hacking.
